# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

Resources:
  MySQSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub 'MySQSTopic-${AWS::AccountId}'

  MySQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub 'MySQSQueue-${AWS::AccountId}'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 86400 # 1 day in seconds

  SQSVisibilityTimeout:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueueAttribute
    DependsOn: MySQSQueue
    Properties:
      QueueUrl: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn
      AttributeName: VisibilityTimeout
      AttributeValue: '30' # visibility timeout of 30 seconds

  SQSQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    DependsOn: MySQSQueue
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: AllowPublisherPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'SQS:SendMessage'
              - 'SQS:DeleteMessage'
              - 'SQS:GetQueueAttributes'

  SNSQueueSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    DependsOn: MySQSTopic
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !GetAtt MySQSTopic.Arn
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn

Outputs:
  SQSQueueURL:
    Value: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn
    Description: URL of the SQS queue

  SNSTopicArn:
    Value: !GetAtt MySQSTopic.Arn
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
